message:
refactor(mesh): Fetch object metadata before admission control

Reorder operations in MeshNode request handling to fetch object metadata
before validating the request for admission control:

- Move get_object_meta() call before validate_request()
- Pass meta.oti.symbol_size to validate_request() for accurate estimation
- Remove duplicate get_object_meta() call after validation

This change supports the updated validate_request() signature that now
requires symbol_size for accurate response size estimation. By fetching
metadata first, we can provide the actual symbol size rather than
relying on hardcoded assumptions.

The reordering also improves error handling by failing fast on
ObjectNotFound before spending resources on admission control checks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
